shared: Photorealistic 2x2 cat breed contact sheet filling the entire square image edge-to-edge. No outer border, no white mat, no frame, no labels, no captions, no text of any kind. Neutral sage-gray seamless studio background, soft diffuse key light, one realistic adult cat, no collar, no props. Same individual coat and markings in all four cells. Top-left: standing three-quarter. Top-right: standing side profile. Bottom-left: front-facing sit. Bottom-right: head-and-shoulders close-up. Full paws visible when standing. Documentary conformation photography.

breeds.tortoiseshell: Tortoiseshell domestic cat with compact frame, short coat mottled black and warm orange patches (not solid orange or solid black), green-gold eyes, erect ears, pink-and-dark mottled nose.
breeds.khao-manee: Khao Manee with fine-boned elegant frame, pure short white coat, pink nose and ears, odd-eye: one blue eye and one green eye, erect ears, refined Thai cat head.
breeds.domestic-shorthair: Domestic Shorthair with compact medium-small frame, short brown classic tabby coat with mackerel stripes, erect ears, amber eyes, ordinary friendly pet-cat proportions.
breeds.domestic-longhair: Domestic Longhair with compact frame, medium-long fluffy orange tabby coat, ruff and plume tail, erect ears, green eyes, everyday pet longhair look.
breeds.siamese: Siamese with svelte tubular body, long neck, large erect ears, short cream body coat with dark seal-brown points on face ears legs and tail, vivid blue almond eyes, wedge head.
breeds.persian: Persian with cobby low-slung frame, very long dense cream coat, extremely flat brachycephalic face, round copper eyes, small rounded ears, short tail, heavy ruff.
breeds.maine-coon: Maine Coon with large substantial rectangular frame, long shaggy brown classic tabby coat, lynx-tipped ears, square muzzle, bushy plume tail, tufted paws, gold-green eyes.
breeds.ragdoll: Ragdoll with large soft substantial frame, semi-long cream coat with blue points on face ears legs tail, blue eyes, gentle expression, medium ears, plume tail.
breeds.bengal: Bengal with athletic medium frame, short glittering golden coat with bold black rosettes and spots, wild leopard look, large upright ears, gold-green eyes, thick tail with rings.
breeds.british-shorthair: British Shorthair with cobby powerful frame, short dense plush blue-gray coat, round face, chubby cheeks, copper-gold eyes, small neat ears, short thick tail.
breeds.american-shorthair: American Shorthair with balanced medium frame, short silver classic tabby coat with black swirls, round face, green eyes, medium erect ears, solid working-cat build.
breeds.scottish-fold: Scottish Fold with rounded compact frame, short silver tabby coat, distinctive forward-folded ears tight to the head, large round eyes, sweet owl-like face.
breeds.abyssinian: Abyssinian with lithe athletic frame, short ticked ruddy coat each hair banded with color, large alert ears, almond gold eyes, wedge head, long slender tail.
breeds.russian-blue: Russian Blue with fine-boned elegant frame, short dense blue-gray double coat with silver tip sheen, vivid green eyes, large pointed ears, wedge head, graceful tail.
breeds.sphynx: Sphynx with wedge muscular hairless body, wrinkled skin with soft peach fuzz, large bat-like ears, lemon-wedge head, prominent cheekbones, gold-green eyes, whip tail.
breeds.norwegian-forest: Norwegian Forest Cat with large substantial frame, long water-resistant double coat silver-and-black tabby, full ruff and britches, lynx-tipped ears, long bushy tail, almond green eyes.
breeds.siberian: Siberian with large powerful frame, long triple coat brown mackerel tabby, dense ruff, rounded head, medium ears, thick plume tail, green-gold eyes, forest-cat build.
breeds.birman: Birman with stocky medium frame, semi-long cream coat with seal points, deep blue eyes, pure white gloves on all four paws, Roman nose, medium ears, plume tail.
breeds.exotic-shorthair: Exotic Shorthair with cobby Persian-like frame, short plush dense cream coat, flat brachycephalic face, large round copper eyes, small rounded ears, short thick tail.
breeds.devon-rex: Devon Rex with fine-boned pixie frame, short soft wavy gray coat, very large low-set bat ears, large wide-set eyes, short muzzle, slender neck, long whippy tail.
breeds.cornish-rex: Cornish Rex with svelte arched frame, short tight wavy white coat, egg-shaped head, large high ears, Roman profile, long whippy tail, greyhound-like cat proportions.
breeds.savannah: Savannah with tall lean large frame, short golden spotted coat with bold black spots, very large high ears, long legs, long thick spotted tail, exotic serval-like look, gold eyes.
breeds.manx: Manx with round compact frame, short red classic tabby coat, completely tailless rounded rump, short back, round head, medium ears, copper eyes, sturdy legs.
breeds.bombay: Bombay with muscular medium-small frame, short glossy jet-black coat, round copper-gold eyes, rounded head, medium ears, patent-leather sheen, panther-like mini look.
breeds.chartreux: Chartreux with muscular medium frame, short dense blue-gray woolly coat, copper-orange eyes, robust jowls, medium ears, smile-like mouth, powerful legs, medium tail.
breeds.turkish-angora: Turkish Angora with fine-boned graceful frame, semi-long silky pure white coat, large upright ears, almond blue eyes, elegant wedge head, plume tail carried high.
breeds.turkish-van: Turkish Van with athletic medium-large frame, semi-long chalk-white coat with auburn head and tail markings (van pattern), amber eyes, large ears, cashmere-like texture.
breeds.burmese: Burmese with compact muscular frame, short satin sable-brown coat, large gold eyes, rounded head, medium ears, sweet expression, medium tail tapering to a rounded tip.
breeds.tonkinese: Tonkinese with medium foreign frame, short mink blue-point coat, medium wedge head, oval aqua-green eyes, medium ears, sleek coat, balanced tail.
breeds.oriental-shorthair: Oriental Shorthair with extreme foreign svelte frame, short ebony solid black coat, very large ears, long wedge head, almond green eyes, long whippy tail, elegant tubular body.
breeds.himalayan: Himalayan (Colorpoint Persian) with cobby frame, very long cream coat with seal points, flat face, round blue eyes, small ears, full ruff, short tail, heavy longhair points.
breeds.ragamuffin: Ragamuffin with large substantial soft frame, long plush multi-color patched coat cream and gray, sweet walnut eyes, medium ears, rectangular body, full plume tail.
breeds.nebelung: Nebelung with medium fine-boned frame, semi-long blue-gray coat with silver tip sheen, vivid green eyes, large pointed ears, Russian Blue type with longer coat and plume tail.
breeds.munchkin: Munchkin with small short-legged frame, short silver tabby coat, normal-length body, very short legs, medium erect ears, golden eyes, long tail held high.
breeds.egyptian-mau: Egyptian Mau with athletic medium-small frame, short silver spotted coat with random black spots, gooseberry green eyes, medium ears, natural spotted tabby, banded tail.
breeds.somali: Somali with lithe medium frame, semi-long ticked ruddy coat, full fox-like plume tail, large ears, almond gold eyes, Abyssinian type with longer coat and ruff.
breeds.balinese: Balinese with svelte Siamese-like frame, semi-long cream coat with seal points, deep blue eyes, large ears, plume tail, long elegant wedge head, silky coat.
breeds.japanese-bobtail: Japanese Bobtail with lean medium-small frame, short tri-color mi-ke coat (white black red), distinctive short pom-pom bobtail, large upright ears, gold eyes, triangular head.
breeds.singapura: Singapura with tiny fine-boned frame, short sepia agouti ticked coat, large almond hazel eyes, large ears, small refined head, delicate legs, short tail with dark tip.
breeds.ocicat: Ocicat with athletic medium frame, short tawny spotted coat with thumbprint spots, large upright ears, almond gold eyes, wild-looking but fully domestic, spotted tail tip.
breeds.havana-brown: Havana Brown with firm medium frame, short rich mahogany-brown coat, vivid green oval eyes, large forward-tilted ears, distinctive corn-cob muzzle, medium tail.
breeds.american-curl: American Curl with balanced medium frame, semi-long cream coat, distinctive ears curling backward at the tips, walnut eyes, sweet open expression, plume tail.
breeds.selkirk-rex: Selkirk Rex with stocky medium frame, curly plush blue-cream coat with loose ringlets, round face, medium ears, woolly curly whiskers, full curly plume tail.
